name: Ariane 6
first: Europe's successor do Ariane 5, with restartable upper stage for direct injection
description: Two-stage launcher in two configurations: Ariane 62 with two solid boosters and Ariane 64 with four. The Vinci-powered cryogenic upper stage is restartable, enabling complex multi-orbit deployments and direct interplanetary injection. Inaugural let July 2024.
